message:
test(store): OBJECT ENCODING transition conformance matrix (br-frankenredis-euqm)

Adds crates/fr-store/tests/encoding_matrix.rs — 22 spec-derived +
metamorphic cases exercising every per-type encoding threshold and
guarding the ENC-MONO and ENC-NO-SHIFT invariants from the
/testing-conformance-harnesses Pattern 4 + Pattern 3 playbook.

Surface covered:

 * String: "int" / "embstr" / "raw" transition matrix (canonical i64
   round-trip, leading-plus noncanonical rejection, 44/45-byte embstr
   boundary).
 * Hash: listpack → hashtable at hash_max_listpack_entries (128),
   plus hashtable when any value or field name exceeds
   hash_max_listpack_value (64).
 * Set: intset for all-integer under intset threshold (512); switch to
   listpack on first non-integer; hashtable past set_max_listpack_entries
   (128) OR past intset threshold when still all-integer.
 * Sorted set: listpack → skiplist at zset_max_listpack_entries (128)
   and skiplist when any member exceeds zset_max_listpack_value (64).
 * List: listpack → quicklist at list_max_listpack_entries (128) and on
   any value > list_max_listpack_value (64).

Metamorphic:

 * mr_enc_mono_hash_does_not_downgrade_on_insert_sweep: insert sweep from
   0→140 entries observes exactly one transition, listpack → hashtable,
   and never regresses.
 * mr_enc_no_shift_on_replace_hash_value_same_size: replacing a field's
   value with another of identical size leaves encoding unchanged.
 * mr_enc_mono_zset_does_not_downgrade_on_insert_sweep: same sweep shape
   for zset, flipping listpack → skiplist at most once.

No implementation change; test-only addition. 22 new tests pass in
cargo test -p fr-store --test encoding_matrix.

Co-Authored-By: cc-redis <noreply@anthropic.com>
